name: Drill Crab
description:
Does anybody love drill crabs? Then it is for you! This bot improves and expands the behaviour of the drill crabs of how they escape the cycle, how they behave or their eating habits.

Sorry for the spoiler, it has been almost 2 months since the Rain World Watcher release so I suppose most people knows it?

(Still wip to work on the drill crab behaviour and how they should actually use their shells for defense instead of running away. And stopping them from burrowing too much and trying to get them stop getting back to their dens)
creator: Bigcheesy9873
